## EVENTS
###### Comps, social events, film screenings, more!
![BRG Outdoors : Bouldering](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/1a2166_c91b7ea69a9b44158ac6f9e4d5aad199~mv2.png/v1/fit/w_537,h_350,q_90,enc_avif,quality_auto/1a2166_c91b7ea69a9b44158ac6f9e4d5aad199~mv2.png)
![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/1a2166_8c287b8ac44947c5b6f07f366dd8d65e~mv2_d_2048_1366_s_2.jpg/v1/fit/w_525,h_350,q_90,enc_avif,quality_auto/1a2166_8c287b8ac44947c5b6f07f366dd8d65e~mv2_d_2048_1366_s_2.jpg)
###  Boulder Bash 9  

Sunday, November 9th - Friday, November 14th
We’re stoked to announce that our annual Fall bouldering competition, Boulder Bash 9, will be held the week of Sunday, November 9th.​
We’ll kick off a week-long Redpoint Round Sunday, November 9th with donuts and coffee. You’ll have until closing time on Thursday, November 13th to climb your heart out on a host of fresh comp-style boulders. Points are awarded for sends, with the most points awarded for flashes and fewer points for subsequent attempts.
​​
The top 10 competitors will be invited to participate in an Onsight Finals round the evening of Friday, November 14th. The rest of us will eat pizza, drink beer, and cheer the top competitors on from the Mezzanine Lounge while they duke it out for the top 3 podium spots and cash prizes.
​
  * Members: $25 gets you donuts, coffee, a t-shirt, a week of climbing, and an onsight finals round with beer + pizza.
  * Non-Members: $50 gets you the above, plus access to the gym all week!​
  * Spectators: Onsight Finals Spectators are free. Must have a waiver completed in advance. Pizza + Beer $5 donation if you're not already registered for comp.


​
Shoutout to [Ocean View Brew Works](https://www.oceanviewbrews.com/), [Matchpoint Brewing](https://www.matchpointbrewing.com/), [Occasionalish](https://occasionalish.com/), [Marquis](https://drinkmarquis.com/), and [Oncrux](https://www.oncrux.com/) for sponsoring this event!
We hope this new format will be the perfect blend of accessibility and hype that you’ve come to expect from your favorite neighborhood bouldering gym, and we sincerely hope you join us for it!
​​
In addition to Boulder Bash, we have a few other events coming in November that we want you to be aware of:
  * USAC Youth + Collegiate QE: Saturday, November 8th
  * California Climbing Team Onsight Series Sunday, November 9th 7am-11am
  * NorCal Youth Climbing League: Saturday, November 22nd


The gym will be closed all day on both the 8th and the 22nd for these events.
[Sign Up Now](https://climber.hellocapitan.com/bridgesrockgym/schedule/event/1148461/select-num-participants/)
###  Reel Rock 19 @ Bridges  

Reel Rock is back at Bridges! We’ll be taking over the Yoga Shed after Movement class and turning it into our own private movie theatre! Film runs 7:00pm - 8:30pm.
Reel Rock 19 showcases three world-premiere climbing films spanning disciplines, characters, and continents: a heartfelt story of second chances in love and climbing on Squamish’s legendary Cobra Crack; an outrageous 18-day big wall epic on Patagonia’s towering Torre Central; and the pursuit of a lifelong dream—a 5.15 first ascent—made possible by an unlikely partnership.
DEATH OF VILLAINS: A former child climbing-prodigy confronts his struggle with disordered eating to attempt his life-long dream of climbing a groundbreaking 5.15 first ascent, with the help of an unlikely, and controversial partner.
Featuring: Kai Lightner & Joe Kinder
RIDERS ON THE STORM: Three Belgian big-wallers endure eighteen days of howling snowstorms, frozen feet, and gnarly runouts in their attempt to make a long-coveted alpine first ascent. 
Featuring: Siebe Vanhee, Sean Villanueva O’Driscoll & Nico Favresse
THE COBRA & THE HEART: A turbulent 20-year saga of love, loss, and redemption: a whirlwind romance, a crushing defeat on a legendary climb, a religious epiphany, and family betrayal, all building to a desperate bid for a rare second chance—at love, fatherhood, and climbing.
Featuring: Didier Berthod, Thomasina Pidgeon & Cedar Pidgeon
UPDATE: Reel Rock is moving to the lounge instead of the Shed, and will be free for members, $5 for non-members (thanks to $5 Friday!). We'll have beer on tap from Ocean View Brew Works and we'll have a raffle for all registered attendees!
[Register Here](https://climber.hellocapitan.com/bridgesrockgym/schedule/event/1069938/select-num-participants/?utm_source=General+Interest&utm_campaign=e8f13d1c47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_10_08_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-181bfe3d46-)
###  Parents Night Out  

Need a break? We’ve got you covered!
​
Drop off your kids (ages 6-13) for an evening packed with climbing adventures, engaging games, and a pizza dinner. While they have a blast under the supervision of our experienced staff, you can enjoy a well-deserved night out. All climbing gear is provided, and no prior climbing experience is necessary. Spaces are limited, so reserve your child's spot today!
​
We host this event every 3rd Friday of the month. Starts April 18th! 
[Register Here](https://climber.hellocapitan.com/bridgesrockgym/schedule/event/1069941/select-num-participants/?utm_source=General+Interest&utm_campaign=e8f13d1c47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_10_08_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-181bfe3d46-)
